rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THOMAS J. COLLIER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, December 18, 2007. Trustee Debra Dolch's motion to compel further responses special interrogatories and request for production of documents. Interrogatories 1 - 4 While the interrogatories contain subparts and should be redrafted, the motion is denied based on the invocation of the privilege against self-incrimination. Unless and until Respondent responds to the interrogatories, Respondent is prohibited from introducing any evidence as to any activity relating to the subject matter of the interrogatories. The remaining objections are overruled request for production of documents granted in part 1 - 18 Granted. The objections are overruled 19 - 20 The requests are moot. = (610/BEC)
